mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_document (knowledge_base_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, file_hash, parse_status, error_message, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{knowledgeBaseId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{fileHash}, #{parseStatus}, #{errorMessage}, COALESCE(#{version}, 1), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_document SET file_name = #{fileName}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_hash = #{fileHash}, parse_status = 'PARSED', error_message = NULL, version = COALESCE(version, 0) + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
